positive: A celestial, dreamcore abstract composition featuring intertwined bioluminescent forest flora and minimalist geometric constellations. The main subject is a stylized crescent moon partially obscured by glowing, stylized fern leaves and nebulae dust. Use strong, deep indigo blues, electric teal accents, and contrasting creamy gold highlights. The style should be highly symmetrical, flat graphic illustration blended with ethereal watercolor elements. Composition must feature clean, defined silhouettes and dramatic contrast for optimal apparel printing. High detail, clean vector quality, cinematic lighting, central composition.
